summary: Comprehensive testing of Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS SPA conversion. All 18 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly. Page load time 0.54s (well under 3s target).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/courses - returns 9 courses
Backend: GET /api/courses/{id} - returns single course with details
Backend: GET /api/reviews - returns reviews list
Backend: GET /api/diploma-tracks - returns diploma tracks
Backend: GET /api/video-testimonials - returns approved videos only
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - successful login with correct password
Backend: POST /api/admin/login - returns 401 for wrong password
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns 401 without auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/stats - returns dashboard stats with auth
Backend: GET /api/admin/courses - returns all 9 courses
Backend: GET /api/admin/expenses - returns expenses list
Backend: GET /api/admin/expenses/stats - returns expense stats
Backend: GET /api/admin/video-testimonials - returns all videos
Backend: GET /api/admin/students - returns students list
Backend: GET /api/admin/enrollments - returns enrollments list
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/{id}/outline - updates course outline
Backend: PUT /api/admin/courses/nonexistent/outline - returns 404
Backend: Expense CRUD flow (create, read, delete) works correctly
Frontend: Homepage loads with hero, courses grid, stats, footer, WhatsApp widget
Frontend: Page load time 0.54s (under 3s target) - PASS
Frontend: Courses page loads all 9 courses with search and category filter
Frontend: Search filter works (typing 'Graphic' shows 1 course)
Frontend: Category filter works (clicking 'Technology' filters courses)
Frontend: Course Detail page loads with outline, requirements, what you'll learn
Frontend: About page renders correctly
Frontend: Contact page renders with form
Frontend: FAQ page renders with expandable questions
Frontend: Video Testimonials public page renders with no duplicate header/footer
Frontend: Admin Login - enter password and access admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows stats cards (9 courses, students, enrollments, pending, defaulters)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows revenue stats and quick actions
Frontend: Admin Courses page shows 9 course cards with Outline button
Frontend: Admin Courses - Outline editor modal opens with Add Week, Save Outline
Frontend: Admin Expenses page shows stats cards, chart, expense list
Frontend: Admin Expenses - Add expense modal works with Category, Amount, Description, Month, Year
Frontend: Admin Video Testimonials page loads with filter tabs (All, pending, approved, rejected)
Frontend: Admin Video Testimonials - Add video modal works
Frontend: SPA navigation works (clicking links navigates without full reload)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested the COMPLETE Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS conversion from React. The frontend now uses: 1) Static file server (serve.js on port 3000) instead of CRA, 2) Tailwind CSS CDN for styling, 3) Lucide icons CDN, 4) Fetch API for HTTP calls, 5) pushState routing (not hash-based). All pages converted including public pages (home, courses, course detail, about, contact, FAQ, video testimonials) and admin pages (login, dashboard, courses with outline editor, expenses, video testimonials). Page load time is 0.54s (well under 3s target). SPA navigation works correctly. Backend APIs unchanged and all working. Email notifications remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Resend email notifications (logs to console instead of sending real emails)
